rationale: Cross-service change (vexa-bot capture, meeting-api deferred pipeline, dashboard UI) with multiple schema migrations (Transcription.speaker_cluster, MediaFile participant dimension, speaker_profiles + voiceprints), touching the regression-scarred recording/finalizer path, and introducing biometric PII (voiceprints) that requires consent, encryption, tenant isolation, and delete/opt-out. Playback-correctness and privacy sensitive. Phased: Phase 1 is the smallest-blast-radius value drop (cluster-aware correction on the existing mixed master); Phases 2-4 are separately mergeable L sub-deliverables.
